creator: jus@athena.za.net
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	inflex
#	inflex/Makefile
#	inflex/files
#	inflex/patches
#	inflex/pkg
#	inflex/files/md5
#	inflex/patches/patch-aa
#	inflex/patches/patch-ab
#	inflex/pkg/COMMENT
#	inflex/pkg/DESCR
#	inflex/pkg/MESSAGE
#	inflex/pkg/PLIST
#
echo c - inflex
mkdir -p inflex > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - inflex/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/Makefile << 'END-of-inflex/Makefile'
X# New ports collection Makefile for:	inflex
X# Date created:		18 August 2000
X# Whom:			Justin Stanford <jus@security.za.net>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	inflex
XPORTVERSION=	0.1.5.c
XCATEGORIES=	security
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.inflex.co.za/
XDISTNAME=	inflex-0.1.5c
XDISTFILES=	inflex-0.1.5c.tar.gz
X
XMAINTAINER=	jus@security.za.net
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/metamail:${PORTSDIR}/mail/metamail \
X		${LOCALBASE}/bin/formail:${PORTSDIR}/mail/procmail
X
Xdo-install:
X	${MKDIR} /var/spool/inflexmq
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/inflex ${PREFIX}/bin
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/inflex.cf /etc
X
Xpost-install:
X		${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/INSTALL ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/AUTHORS ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/CHANGELOG ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/COPYING ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/COPYRIGHT ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/EXIM_USERS ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README.1ST ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/THANKS ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/TODO ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/UNINSTALL ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/ModifyingInflex ${PREFIX}/share/doc/inflex
X		${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-inflex/Makefile
echo c - inflex/files
mkdir -p inflex/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - inflex/patches
mkdir -p inflex/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - inflex/pkg
mkdir -p inflex/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - inflex/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/files/md5 << 'END-of-inflex/files/md5'
XMD5 (inflex-0.1.5c.tar.gz) = be49f6d454f99bcb34687a54dbcddbd1
END-of-inflex/files/md5
echo x - inflex/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-inflex/patches/patch-aa'
X--- inflex.orig	Wed Jul 26 17:12:27 2000
X+++ inflex	Fri Aug 18 13:42:53 2000
X@@ -129,21 +129,21 @@
X #
X # setup our commonly used files
X #
X-test=/usr/bin/test
X-mail=/bin/mail
X+test=/bin/test
X+mail=/usr/bin/mail
X grep=/usr/bin/grep
X file=/usr/bin/file
X find=/usr/bin/find
X-touch=/bin/touch
X-metamail=/usr/bin/metamail
X-formail=/usr/bin/formail
X+touch=/usr/bin/touch
X+metamail=/usr/local/bin/metamail
X+formail=/usr/local/bin/formail
X 
X 
X #
X # Our MAIL PROGRAMS
X #
X sendmail=/usr/sbin/sendmail
X-exim=/usr/exim/bin/exim
X+exim=/usr/local/sbin/exim
X 
X # 
X # Our Virus Scanners
X@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@
X #sophos=/usr/local/bin/sweep
X sophos=
X mcafee=
X-fsav=/usr/local/fsav/fsav
X+fsav=
X 
X 
X # 
END-of-inflex/patches/patch-aa
echo x - inflex/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-inflex/patches/patch-ab'
X--- inflex.cf.orig	Mon Jul 24 22:43:12 2000
X+++ inflex.cf	Fri Aug 18 13:43:01 2000
X@@ -895,7 +895,7 @@
X 
X #####  @(#)local.m4	8.30 (Berkeley) 6/30/1998  #####
X 
X-Minflex,	P=/usr/sbin/inflex, F=CsDFM:/|@qShP, S=0, R=0
X+Minflex,	P=/usr/local/bin/inflex, F=CsDFM:/|@qShP, S=0, R=0
X 		T=DNS/RFC822/X-Unix,
X 		A=inflex $h $u $f
X 
END-of-inflex/patches/patch-ab
echo x - inflex/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-inflex/pkg/COMMENT'
XInbound/outbound antivirus e-mail scanner for sendmail servers
END-of-inflex/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - inflex/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-inflex/pkg/DESCR'
XInflex is an inline virus scanner for sendmail mail servers (a port for
Xexim use also exists) which utilises an external virus scanner to scan all
Xinbound and outbound e-mail and attachments for viruses, and stop them
Xbefore they reach the recipients. 
X
XInflex notifies both the sender and the receiver that the mail is infected
Xand has been halted.
X
XInflex does not impose much overhead and has been tested and is in use on
Xmajor corporate networks with large amounts of mail traffic.
X
XWWW: http://www.inflex.co.za/
X
X- jus
Xjus@security.za.net
END-of-inflex/pkg/DESCR
echo x - inflex/pkg/MESSAGE
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/pkg/MESSAGE << 'END-of-inflex/pkg/MESSAGE'
X                        === INFLEX INSTALLATION ===
X
X(*) You need to download and install one of the antivirus programs
Xsupported by inflex.
X
XFrom inflex INSTALL:
X        
X	You can obtain F-Prot AntiVirus from http://www.gas.co.za
X        ALTERNATIVELY YOU CAN INSTALL...
X	
X	Sophos AntiVirus:
X	http://www.sophos.com
X	
X	NAI UVScan [McAfee] (Check "/usr/ports/security/vscan/"):
X	http://www.mcafee.com					
X
X(*) You now need to edit /usr/local/bin/inflex and set your antivirus
Xprogram of choice, aswell as the email address of the administrator.
X
X(*) Kill sendmail, then start it up with inflex's sendmail config:
X
X	/usr/sbin/sendmail -bd -C /etc/inflex.cf
X
X(*) You're ready to roll - send some viruses through to check that it
Xworks. The inflex documentation is in "/usr/local/share/doc/inflex/".
END-of-inflex/pkg/MESSAGE
echo x - inflex/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >inflex/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-inflex/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/inflex
X@cwd /
X/etc/inflex.cf
X@dirrm /var/spool/inflexmq
END-of-inflex/pkg/PLIST
exit
